00:14:13	Janet Ungs - Minneapolis, MN USA:	Eily, if we are in a breakout and get disconnected, how do we come back in?  That happened to me last time.  Got kicked off. I obviously hit the wrong key or something.  I didn't know how to get back into my breakout session.

You just log back in.  It happened to everyone last time.  There will be no breakouts today.
